extraction_notes: Wikipedia source contains game credits (composers: Hirokazu Tanaka, Takane Ōkubo) but no documented music parameters including tempo, keys, chord progressions, time signatures, modes, energy levels, or SFX characteristics for Wrecking Crew '98.
